manualTodo: EN: Reinstall and sign in with the account password and Secret Key.
TR: Hesap parolasi ve Secret Key ile yeniden kurup giris yapin.

uiWarning.en: 1Password local account data, device identity, keys, and session state are not copied. Restore is through account sign-in and sync.
uiWarning.tr: 1Password yerel hesap verisi, cihaz kimligi, anahtarlar ve oturum durumu kopyalanmaz. Geri yukleme hesap girisi ve senkron ile yapilir.

manualTodo: EN: Verify you have the Emergency Kit/Secret Key and can sign in before formatting.
TR: Format oncesi Emergency Kit/Secret Key'in sizde oldugunu ve giris yapabildiginizi dogrulayin.
